text: I feel a gentle buzz of curiosity in this space. Just outside the glass-walled room, the hum of quiet conversations contrasts with the silent anticipation before entering a showcase of ideas. When I turn toward the R+D wall, the colors and the bright, bold text fill me with possibility. Here, surrounded by the intersection of research and design, I feel both an observer and a participant—eager to marvel at how humans strive to understand, innovate, and coexist with technology. Standing between introspection and discovery, I wonder how these spaces shape us, even as we attempt to shape them.
